regional_cost_note: Carpet laying in Auckland typically costs $30–$115/m² supply and installed (budget to mid-range), or $10–$20/m² labour only. Premium wool can reach $250/m². A small home (65–75 m²) runs $4,200–$11,150 all-in. Full carpet removal adds $5–$15/m². Most Auckland providers offer free measure and quote with no callout fee.

businesses.name: United Flooring Ltd
businesses.known_for: Carpet, laminate, vinyl, SPC planks and carpet tiles using Feltex and Godfrey Hirst brands; consistently praised for communication, punctuality and neat finish.

businesses.name: John Jarvis Carpet & Flooring
businesses.known_for: Independent NZ-owned supply and installation specialists since 1985; wholesale pricing on carpet, vinyl, timber and laminate across greater Auckland.

businesses.name: Giles Carpets Ltd
businesses.known_for: 44+ years in business supplying premium pure wool and brand-name carpets at wholesale prices with knowledgeable staff and high-quality laying teams.

businesses.name: Harrisons Carpet & Flooring Auckland
businesses.known_for: NZ's No.1 flooring retailer (Canstar Blue 2023); mobile in-home consultation model since 1962 covering North Shore, Howick and wider Auckland.

businesses.name: CarpetGo
businesses.known_for: Supply and install one-stop-shop since 1991; budget-focused pricing with vinyl and carpet repair services also available.
